comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
The Rock War featured China White from Creich, Victim from Nottinghamshire and No Excuse from London. China White won, with Victim second and No Excuse third.
Interview with Paul Stanley of Kiss, starting before the first Kiss track.
After the Skid Row track, Tommy mentions that he'll be recording the next Friday Rock Show at the Newcastle Mayfair with Little Angels and Marshall Law live on stage.
After the third Sweet Addiction session track, Tommy mentions that the majority of responses to his question wanted the Friday Night Connection back.

track_listing.track: Sweet Addiction - Down to the Bone (FRS session)
Faith No More - From Out of Nowhere
China White - Calling Out Your Name (Rock War act)
Victim - Across the Miles (Rock War act)
No Excuse - How to Be a Fool (Rock War act)
Sweet Addiction - Putting You Wrong (FRS session)
Sweet Addiction - Little Too Easy (FRS session)
